name: ANC_ABS_CERTIFICATIONS_VL
query: SELECT AbsenceCertificationsDEO.ABSENCE_CERTIFICATION_ID, AbsenceCertificationsDEO.ANC_ABS_CERTIFICATION_F_ALTCD, AbsenceCertificationsDEO.AUTO_COMPLETE_FLAG, AbsenceCertificationsDEO.LEGISLATION_CODE, AbsenceCertificationsDEO.CERT_ADMIN_UPLOAD, AbsenceCertificationsDEO.CERT_COMPLETE_CALC_CD, AbsenceCertificationsDEO.CERT_COMPLETE_CALC_MODE_CD, AbsenceCertificationsDEO.CERT_COMPLETE_CALC_OVERRIDE, AbsenceCertificationsDEO.CERT_COMPLETE_NOTIF_ADMIN, AbsenceCertificationsDEO.CERT_COMPLETE_NOTIF_EMP, AbsenceCertificationsDEO.CERT_COMPLETE_NOTIF_MGR, AbsenceCertificationsDEO.CERT_COMPLETE_UPDATE_CD, AbsenceCertificationsDEO.CERT_CREATE_CALC_CD, AbsenceCertificationsDEO.CERT_CREATE_CALC_MODE_CD, AbsenceCertificationsDEO.CERT_CREATE_CALC_OVERRIDE, AbsenceCertificationsDEO.CERT_CREATE_NOTIF_ADMIN, AbsenceCertificationsDEO.CERT_CREATE_NOTIF_EMP, AbsenceCertificationsDEO.CERT_CREATE_NOTIF_MGR, AbsenceCertificationsDEO.CERT_CREATE_UPDATE_CD, AbsenceCertificationsDEO.CERT_DUE_DATE_CALC_CD, AbsenceCertificationsDEO.CERT_DUE_DATE_CALC_MODE_CD, AbsenceCertificationsDEO.CERT_DUE_DATE_CALC_OVERRIDE, AbsenceCertificationsDEO.CERT_DUE_DATE_NOTIF_ADMIN, AbsenceCertificationsDEO.CERT_DUE_DATE_NOTIF_EMP, AbsenceCertificationsDEO.CERT_DUE_DATE_NOTIF_MGR, AbsenceCertificationsDEO.CERT_DUE_DATE_UPDATE_CD, AbsenceCertificationsDEO.CERT_EMPLOYEE_UPLOAD, AbsenceCertificationsDEO.CERT_EMPLOYEE_USE_CD, AbsenceCertificationsDEO.CERT_EXPIRE_CALC_CD, AbsenceCertificationsDEO.CERT_EXPIRE_CALC_MODE_CD, AbsenceCertificationsDEO.CERT_EXPIRE_CALC_OVERRIDE, AbsenceCertificationsDEO.CERT_EXPIRE_NOTIF_ADMIN, AbsenceCertificationsDEO.CERT_EXPIRE_NOTIF_EMP, AbsenceCertificationsDEO.CERT_EXPIRE_NOTIF_MGR, AbsenceCertificationsDEO.CERT_EXPIRE_UPDATE_CD, AbsenceCertificationsDEO.CERT_MANAGER_UPLOAD, AbsenceCertificationsDEO.CERT_MANAGER_USE_CD, AbsenceCertificationsTransla1.NAME, AbsenceCertificationsDEO.CERT_USE_CD, AbsenceCertificationsDEO.CERT_STATUS_CD, AbsenceCertificationsDEO.CERT_TRIGGER_CD, AbsenceCertificationsDEO.CREATED_BY, AbsenceCertificationsDEO.CREATION_DATE, AbsenceCertificationsDEO.DUE_DATE_REFERENCE_DATE_CD, AbsenceCertificationsDEO.DUE_DATE_TYPE_CD, AbsenceCertificationsDEO.DUE_DATE_UNITS, AbsenceCertificationsDEO.DUE_DATE_UOM_CD, AbsenceCertificationsDEO.EFFECTIVE_END_DATE, AbsenceCertificationsDEO.EFFECTIVE_START_DATE, AbsenceCertificationsDEO.ENTERPRISE_ID, AbsenceCertificationsDEO.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, AbsenceCertificationsDEO.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, AbsenceCertificationsDEO.LAST_UPDATED_BY, AbsenceCertificationsDEO.OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER, AbsenceCertificationsDEO.UPDATE_ABSENCE_ENTRY, AbsenceCertificationsTransla1.ABSENCE_CERTIFICATION_DESC, AbsenceCertificationsTransla1.LANGUAGE, AbsenceCertificationsTransla1.SOURCE_LANG, AbsenceCertificationsDEO.DOCUMENT_TYPE_ID, AbsenceCertificationsDEO.MANAGEMENT_TYPE_CD, AbsenceCertificationsDEO.CONFIRM_ON_DEMAND, AbsenceCertificationsDEO.ALLOW_ON_DEMAND, AbsenceCertificationsDEO.CNFM_RSN_RULE, AbsenceCertificationsDEO.CNFM_RSN_VALUES, AbsenceCertificationsDEO.EXPIRY_RULE, AbsenceCertificationsDEO.EXPIRY_REF_DATE, AbsenceCertificationsDEO.EXPIRY_UOM, AbsenceCertificationsDEO.VOID_RSN_RULE, AbsenceCertificationsDEO.VOID_RSN_VALUES, AbsenceCertificationsDEO.EXPIRY_DURATION, AbsenceCertificationsDEO.ELIG_PROFILE_ID, AbsenceCertificationsDEO.SGUID SGUID, AbsenceCertificationsDEO.BASE_NAME FROM ANC_ABS_CERTIFICATIONS_F AbsenceCertificationsDEO, ANC_ABS_CERTIFICATIONS_F_TL AbsenceCertificationsTransla1 WHERE AbsenceCertificationsDEO.ABSENCE_CERTIFICATION_ID = AbsenceCertificationsTransla1.ABSENCE_CERTIFICATION_ID AND AbsenceCertificationsDEO.EFFECTIVE_END_DATE = AbsenceCertificationsTransla1.EFFECTIVE_END_DATE AND AbsenceCertificationsDEO.EFFECTIVE_START_DATE = AbsenceCertificationsTransla1.EFFECTIVE_START_DATE AND AbsenceCertificationsTransla1.LANGUAGE = SYS_CONTEXT('USERENV', 'LANG')
